title: SwarmKit Fleet Register Request
description: Mode A (panel → instance) enrollment request body for serve `POST /fleet/register`. The one-time enrollment token is the Bearer credential (not in the body) and is authoritative for scope; `requested_scope` is advisory. See design details/control-plane/19-fleet-enrollment-protocol.md (§Endpoint spec).

requested_scope.description: Advisory; the enrollment token's scope is authoritative (a monitor token can't self-upgrade to manage).

fleet_public_key.description: Optional fleet identity (design 21): base64 Ed25519 public key. When present, fleet_id must equal its fingerprint and `proof` must verify.

proof.description: Base64 Ed25519 signature over `<enrollment_token>:<target_workspace_id>`, proving possession of the private key for fleet_public_key.

target_workspace_id.description: The workspace the fleet believes it is enrolling; binds the proof to this instance (empty = unbound).

display_name.description: Optional human label for the fleet (cosmetic; fleet_id is the identity).
